title: Chapter 214

“What do you mean they escaped?” A terrifyingly beautiful woman asked, the scowl on her face doing nothing to diminish her beauty.

“Gwoh…”

A bizarre creature, which looked like it was made of human flesh, made a strange sound with its hideous head lowered like a naughty child who had done something bad.

“Ugh! You ugly fucks. I can’t even rely on you for one thing.” The woman said before she sighed, not really too angry at the creature.

“I guess I’m at fault too.” She said, pulling a rod out of her exposed pussy, the juices leaking from it, spurting out at once.

“I know I need a real thing, but when it hits, damn… I was never this slutty.” The woman muttered to herself before she stood up, fixing her dress before she said, “Well, it’s still convenient. No underwear in this world, and no one to mind. I can do it whenever and wherever I want.”

“It’s really an amazing world.” She said, making her way through a burning manor, making her way to the core of the house, “If only there were dicks too. I wouldn’t have to satisfy myself with these metal rods.”

“Who was the idiot who said men aren’t needed?”

“I would like that dumb bitch to live here. Without a real thing, I’ll see if she can even moan properly.”

She was murmuring to herself, walking without caring about anything in her path. The dead guards were crushed underneath her feet as she made her way to the most important room in the burning manor.

The only part she hadn’t burned.

She opened the door once she found the room she had been looking for.

“Let’s see… Hector town… Lord deceased…” She looked through some notes, going through everything until she found something she needed.

“Family… went to Carlson estate. That’s lucky. I can use that old fuck.”

She returned her attention to the pages again after that.

“Let’s see. Nothing new. Oh… what’s this?”

She stopped at a report and read it carefully.

“A talent? Second circle? That’s impressive. Well, not that impressive, but still… Hmmm… Jack. No second name. A commoner. That’s something. For those old, stuck-up fools to take in a commoner.”

She placed the pages down and kept searching, as if it wasn’t an important piece of information, “Well, knowing them, they must have selected the poor guy for some use anyway. He’ll be killed soon enough.”

Once she was done rummaging through everything, she set everything on fire and came out into the burning town, which was laden with blood and corpses.

“Gwoh…”

As she came out, the bizarre creature from before, or one similar to it, came to it and made the same sound as the one before.

“What?” The woman asked.

“Gwoh…”

“The old bastard? I was just thinking of him. What does he want?”

“Gwoh…”

“Oh. That’s something. He has the guts to move against his wife now? Well, whatever. Not like I care.”

“Gwoh…”

“Yeah, yeah. Just take a few of you and go help him out. He’s not gonna be successful anyway. That old bat is a monster. Even I’m not confident.”

The woman murmured at the end while the creature made the same sound and went away.

“Now, what to do with the ones that got away?” She thought a while before she simply shrugged and said, “Well, who cares. Who’s gonna listen to them anyway? Let’s just say they got lucky.”

She turned and began to leave, saying to herself, “Should I try something bigger tonight? Maybe the new dildo I made…”

~~

I actually intended to end this volume here, but I decided to keep going for a little longer. I’m going to need a break after the volume ends because I’m running low on stocked chapters. Just letting you know, since the volume end is still twenty to thirty chapters away.
